title: coreopsis grandiflora f. harveyana
intro: Coreopsis grandiflora f. harveyana, also known as Large-flowered tickseed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coreopsis grandiflora f. harveyana include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile option for natural remedies.
